messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "title": "左侧循环：用户获取（UA）",

左侧循环： 用户获取（ UA）

message.content: This section defines the "Left Loop: User Acquisition (UA)" entity. It answers questions regarding the core definition and primary function of UA, specifically stating that its role is to capture user attention and convert it into initial user actions. The section does not contain dates, procedural steps, quantitative metrics, tables, figures, or evidentiary support.
